moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by Canada, Mexico, and the United States, is currently underway with group stage matches gripping fans globally.

angles.name: World Cup daily chatter
angles.copy: Morning, football fans! The World Cup is well and truly underway, who are you backing to lift the trophy this year? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Standout moments
angles.copy: Another day, another set of World Cup clashes! What's been the standout moment for you so far?

angles.name: Fan engagement
angles.copy: The biggest tournament in football is happening right now. Are you glued to every game or just catching the highlights?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026, the third Grand Slam tennis tournament of the year, begins today at the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club.

angles.name: Game, set, match!
angles.copy: Game, set, and match! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off today – who are you hoping to see in the final? #Wimbledon

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: The grass courts are ready! It's the first day of Wimbledon, time for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis.

angles.name: Dark horse predictions
angles.copy: Dust off your whites, Wimbledon is officially open! Who's your dark horse for the title this year?

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival 2026 Concludes
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival 2026 concludes today, wrapping up five days of music, arts, and culture at Worthy Farm.

angles.name: Glasto wrap-up
angles.copy: That's a wrap on Glastonbury 2026! What was your favourite moment or performance from this year's festival?

angles.name: Festival recovery
angles.copy: The mud is drying, the stages are coming down. Who headlined your personal Glastonbury this year, even if you were watching from home?

angles.name: Already dreaming of next year
angles.copy: Glastonbury 2026 bows out today. Already dreaming of next year, or are you still recovering from this one?

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix This Weekend
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix 2026 takes place this weekend, July 3-5, at Silverstone Circuit, promising high-speed action.

angles.name: Silverstone countdown
angles.copy: Get ready for some serious speed! The F1 British Grand Prix is at Silverstone this weekend. Who's taking pole position?

angles.name: Home winner hopes
angles.copy: Petrolheads, assemble! The British Grand Prix is just days away. Will we see a home winner this year?

angles.name: Roar of the engines
angles.copy: Silverstone is calling! The roar of F1 engines returns to the UK this weekend for the British Grand Prix.

moments.title: Wireless Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival 2026 brings some of the biggest names in hip-hop, rap, and R&B to Finsbury Park, London, from July 5-7.

angles.name: Wireless hype
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is just around the corner! Who are you most hyped to see at Finsbury Park this weekend?

angles.name: London's big weekend
angles.copy: London's getting ready for Wireless! Three days of massive acts kicking off on Friday. What's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Festival countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to Wireless is on! Get ready for a huge weekend of music in London.

moments.title: Debbie Harry's 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, iconic frontwoman of Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie icon turns 81
angles.copy: Happy almost-birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry! The Blondie icon turns 81 on Wednesday. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Music pioneer tribute
angles.copy: Still looking good, still sounding great! Debbie Harry celebrates her 81st this week. A true music pioneer.

angles.name: Defining an era
angles.copy: From 'Heart of Glass' to 'Call Me', Debbie Harry defined an era. Wishing her a very happy 81st birthday for July 1st!

moments.title: Huey Lewis's 76th Birthday
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Hip to be 76
angles.copy: It's hip to be square, and 76! Happy Birthday to Huey Lewis this Friday, July 5th. What's your go-to track from Huey Lewis and the News?

angles.name: Heart of rock and roll
angles.copy: The heart of rock and roll is still beating strong! Wishing Huey Lewis a very happy 76th birthday for the weekend.

angles.name: Movie moments
angles.copy: Power of Love, indeed! Huey Lewis turns 76 this week. What's your favourite movie moment featuring his music?

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Peace and Love for Ringo
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Ringo Starr turns 86 next week on July 7th. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Beatles legend still going
angles.copy: From Liverpool to global superstar, Ringo Starr is still going strong! Wishing him a very happy 86th for next Monday.

angles.name: Help from his friends
angles.copy: He's got by with a little help from his friends for 86 years! Happy birthday to The Beatles' Ringo Starr on July 7th.

moments.title: Beck's 56th Birthday
moments.blurb: Multi-genre artist Beck will celebrate his 56th birthday on July 8th.

angles.name: Loser, baby!
angles.copy: He's a loser, baby... but a winner in our hearts! Beck turns 56 next Wednesday, July 8th. What's your favourite track from his incredible career?

angles.name: Boundary pusher
angles.copy: From 'Loser' to 'Dreams', Beck has always pushed boundaries. Happy 56th birthday for next week!

angles.name: Unique sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique sound of Beck, who turns 56 on July 8th. What's the first song that comes to mind when you hear his name?

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Live Through This & Celebrate
angles.copy: Live Through This and celebrate! Courtney Love turns 62 next Thursday, July 9th. What's your favourite Hole anthem?

angles.name: Force in rock
angles.copy: A true force in alternative rock, Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday next week. Send her some love!

angles.name: Rock goddess
angles.copy: From rock goddess to actress, Courtney Love has done it all. Happy 62nd birthday for July 9th!

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK's latest series continues nightly, bringing more drama, romance, and recouplings from the villa.

angles.name: Love Island drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island! Who's giving you the 'ick' and who are you backing to find love?

angles.name: Hooked on the villa
angles.copy: Are you hooked on Love Island this year? The drama is heating up in the villa every night!

angles.name: Biggest shockers
angles.copy: Grab your popcorn, Love Island is on again! What's been the biggest shocker of the series so far?

moments.title: New Music Friday Approaching
moments.blurb: This Friday, July 4th, brings a fresh batch of new releases to the UK music scene, with artists vying for chart positions.

angles.name: New music predictions
angles.copy: New Music Friday is just days away! What artists are you hoping drop new tracks this week?

angles.name: Update your playlists
angles.copy: Get ready to update your playlists! Friday means brand new music hitting the airwaves.

angles.name: Chart contenders
angles.copy: Who's going to make a splash on New Music Friday? Tell us your predictions for the biggest releases this week!

moments.title: Summer Weather Across UK
moments.blurb: The UK is currently experiencing typical summer weather, with sunshine and warmer temperatures expected for many areas this week.

angles.name: Making the most of summer
angles.copy: Sun's out (mostly)! What are your plans to make the most of the summer weather this week?

angles.name: Warm temperatures
angles.copy: Warm temperatures and blue skies for many this week! Perfect summer vibes across the UK.

angles.name: Suncream reminder
angles.copy: Don't forget the suncream! Summer is officially here and bringing some lovely weather with it.
